## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend (`apps/web`)
- [ ] API (`apps/api`)
- [ ] AI Service (`apps/ai-service`)
- [ ] Contracts (`packages/contracts`)
- [ ] Database (`packages/database`)
- [ ] Docs only

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:ai`

## Docs

- [ ] Updated API docs if public interface changed
- [ ] Updated frontend handoff doc if frontend-visible capability or integration flow changed
- [ ] Updated AI service README if internal AI capability or env vars changed

## Notes

- Added env vars:
- Breaking API changes:
- Updated docs:
- Follow-up work:
